definition_en: examine in detail to understand or explain

example_sentences.en: Researchers analyze data to identify patterns in climate change.
example_sentences.cn: 研究人员分析数据以识别气候变化中的模式。

example_sentences.en: Students must analyze the author's argument before writing a response.
example_sentences.cn: 学生必须在写回应之前分析作者的论点。

definition_en: a way of dealing with something; to come near

example_sentences.en: The professor introduced a new approach to solving differential equations.
example_sentences.cn: 教授介绍了一种求解微分方程的新方法。

example_sentences.en: As winter approaches, many birds migrate to warmer regions.
example_sentences.cn: 随着冬天临近，许多鸟类迁徙到更温暖的地区。

definition_en: evaluate or estimate the nature, quality, or ability of

example_sentences.en: The committee will assess the impact of the new policy on education.
example_sentences.cn: 委员会将评估新政策对教育的影响。

example_sentences.en: Teachers assess student performance through a variety of methods.
example_sentences.cn: 教师通过多种方法评估学生的表现。

definition_en: suppose to be the case without proof

example_sentences.en: We cannot assume that all students have equal access to technology.
example_sentences.cn: 我们不能假设所有学生都能平等地使用技术。

example_sentences.en: The theory assumes a constant rate of population growth.
example_sentences.cn: 该理论假设人口增长率恒定。

definition_en: the power to give orders or make decisions; an expert

example_sentences.en: The author is a leading authority on marine biology.
example_sentences.cn: 该作者是海洋生物学的权威专家。

example_sentences.en: Local authorities implemented new regulations to reduce pollution.
example_sentences.cn: 地方当局实施了新法规以减少污染。

definition_en: able to be used or obtained

example_sentences.en: The research data is available to the public through the university website.
example_sentences.cn: 研究数据可通过大学网站向公众公开获取。

example_sentences.en: Limited resources are available for this project.
example_sentences.cn: 该项目可用的资源有限。

definition_en: an advantage or profit; to receive an advantage

example_sentences.en: Regular exercise provides significant health benefits.
example_sentences.cn: 定期锻炼能带来显著的健康益处。

example_sentences.en: Students benefit from collaborative learning environments.
example_sentences.cn: 学生从协作学习环境中受益。

definition_en: an abstract idea or general notion

example_sentences.en: The concept of sustainability has become central to urban planning.
example_sentences.cn: 可持续发展的概念已成为城市规划的核心。

example_sentences.en: Students struggled to grasp the abstract concepts in quantum physics.
example_sentences.cn: 学生们难以理解量子物理中的抽象概念。

definition_en: be a part of a whole; to establish

example_sentences.en: Women constitute more than half of the university's student body.
example_sentences.cn: 女性占该大学学生总数的一半以上。

example_sentences.en: These findings constitute a major breakthrough in cancer research.
example_sentences.cn: 这些发现构成了癌症研究的重大突破。

definition_en: the circumstances or setting in which something occurs

example_sentences.en: The meaning of a word can change depending on its context.
example_sentences.cn: 一个词的含义可能随语境而变化。

example_sentences.en: Historical context is essential for understanding the novel.
example_sentences.cn: 历史背景对于理解这部小说至关重要。

definition_en: bring something into existence

example_sentences.en: The new policy aims to create equal opportunities for all citizens.
example_sentences.cn: 新政策旨在为所有公民创造平等的机会。

example_sentences.en: Artists create works that reflect the social issues of their time.
example_sentences.cn: 艺术家创作反映其时代社会问题的作品。

definition_en: state the exact meaning or scope of

example_sentences.en: The study attempts to define the relationship between diet and disease.
example_sentences.cn: 该研究试图界定饮食与疾病之间的关系。

example_sentences.en: It is difficult to precisely define what constitutes intelligence.
example_sentences.cn: 精确定义什么构成智力是困难的。

definition_en: obtain from a specified source

example_sentences.en: Many English words are derived from Latin and Greek roots.
example_sentences.cn: 许多英语单词源自拉丁语和希腊语词根。

example_sentences.en: The company derives most of its revenue from overseas markets.
example_sentences.cn: 该公司大部分收入来自海外市场。

definition_en: give shares of something; spread over an area

example_sentences.en: Wealth is not equally distributed across the population.
example_sentences.cn: 财富在人口中分布不均。

example_sentences.en: The organization distributes food and medical supplies to disaster areas.
example_sentences.cn: 该组织向灾区分发食品和医疗用品。

definition_en: the surroundings or conditions in which something exists

example_sentences.en: Industrial pollution poses a serious threat to the natural environment.
example_sentences.cn: 工业污染对自然环境构成严重威胁。

example_sentences.en: A supportive learning environment enhances student performance.
example_sentences.cn: 支持性的学习环境可以提高学生的表现。

definition_en: set up on a firm or permanent basis

example_sentences.en: The university was established in 1850 as a small liberal arts college.
example_sentences.cn: 该大学于1850年作为一所小型文理学院建立。

example_sentences.en: Scientists established a clear link between smoking and lung cancer.
example_sentences.cn: 科学家确立了吸烟与肺癌之间的明确联系。

definition_en: roughly calculate; an approximate calculation

example_sentences.en: Scientists estimate that the glacier will disappear within 50 years.
example_sentences.cn: 科学家估计该冰川将在50年内消失。

example_sentences.en: The initial cost estimate proved to be far too low.
example_sentences.cn: 最初的成本估算被证明远远偏低。

definition_en: clearly seen or understood; obvious

example_sentences.en: It is evident that climate change is affecting global agriculture.
example_sentences.cn: 气候变化正在影响全球农业，这一点显而易见。

example_sentences.en: The influence of Greek philosophy is evident in Roman architecture.
example_sentences.cn: 希腊哲学的影响在罗马建筑中显而易见。

definition_en: a circumstance or element contributing to a result

example_sentences.en: Economic factors play a crucial role in determining health outcomes.
example_sentences.cn: 经济因素在决定健康结果方面起着关键作用。

example_sentences.en: Several factors contributed to the decline of the Roman Empire.
example_sentences.cn: 多种因素导致了罗马帝国的衰落。

definition_en: purpose or role; to work or operate

example_sentences.en: The primary function of the liver is to filter toxins from the blood.
example_sentences.cn: 肝脏的主要功能是过滤血液中的毒素。

example_sentences.en: The immune system functions as the body's defense mechanism.
example_sentences.cn: 免疫系统作为身体的防御机制运作。

definition_en: recognize or establish what something is

example_sentences.en: Researchers identified three key factors that influence academic success.
example_sentences.cn: 研究人员确定了影响学业成功的三个关键因素。

example_sentences.en: The study aims to identify the causes of biodiversity loss.
example_sentences.cn: 该研究旨在确定生物多样性丧失的原因。

definition_en: point out or show

example_sentences.en: Recent studies indicate a strong correlation between sleep and memory.
example_sentences.cn: 最近的研究表明睡眠与记忆之间存在强相关性。

example_sentences.en: The data indicates that renewable energy use is increasing globally.
example_sentences.cn: 数据表明可再生能源的使用在全球范围内正在增长。

definition_en: a single person; separate and distinct

example_sentences.en: Each individual has a unique genetic makeup.
example_sentences.cn: 每个个体都有独特的基因构成。

example_sentences.en: Individual differences in learning styles should be considered in education.
example_sentences.cn: 教育中应考虑学习风格的个体差异。

definition_en: explain the meaning of

example_sentences.en: Historians interpret the same events in different ways.
example_sentences.cn: 历史学家以不同的方式诠释相同的事件。

example_sentences.en: It is important to interpret statistical results carefully.
example_sentences.cn: 仔细解读统计结果很重要。

definition_en: include as a necessary part; engage in

example_sentences.en: The experiment involved testing subjects under controlled conditions.
example_sentences.cn: 该实验涉及在受控条件下对受试者进行测试。

example_sentences.en: Scientific research often involves collaboration across disciplines.
example_sentences.cn: 科学研究通常涉及跨学科合作。

definition_en: an important topic for debate or discussion

example_sentences.en: Environmental issues have become a central topic in political debates.
example_sentences.cn: 环境问题已成为政治辩论的核心话题。

example_sentences.en: The journal published a special issue on artificial intelligence.
example_sentences.cn: 该期刊出版了一期关于人工智能的特刊。

definition_en: important or significant; a field of study

example_sentences.en: Deforestation is a major cause of habitat loss for wildlife.
example_sentences.cn: 森林砍伐是野生动物栖息地丧失的主要原因。

example_sentences.en: She chose biology as her major at the university.
example_sentences.cn: 她在大学选择了生物学作为专业。

definition_en: a particular way of doing something

example_sentences.en: The researchers used a mixed-methods approach in their study.
example_sentences.cn: 研究人员在研究中使用了混合方法。

example_sentences.en: New methods of data analysis have revolutionized social science.
example_sentences.cn: 新的数据分析方法彻底改变了社会科学。

definition_en: happen; take place

example_sentences.en: Earthquakes frequently occur along tectonic plate boundaries.
example_sentences.cn: 地震经常发生在构造板块边界处。

example_sentences.en: Significant changes in climate have occurred over the past century.
example_sentences.cn: 在过去一个世纪中发生了显著的气候变化。

definition_en: one part in every hundred

example_sentences.en: Approximately 70 percent of Earth's surface is covered by water.
example_sentences.cn: 地球表面大约70%被水覆盖。

example_sentences.en: The study found that 85 percent of participants improved their scores.
example_sentences.cn: 研究发现85%的参与者提高了成绩。

definition_en: a length of time; an era

example_sentences.en: The Jurassic period was dominated by large dinosaurs.
example_sentences.cn: 侏罗纪时期以大型恐龙为主。

example_sentences.en: Economic growth slowed during this period of political instability.
example_sentences.cn: 在这一政治不稳定时期，经济增长放缓。

definition_en: a course of action adopted by an organization or government

example_sentences.en: Government policy on renewable energy has shifted significantly.
example_sentences.cn: 政府在可再生能源方面的政策发生了重大转变。

example_sentences.en: The university revised its admissions policy to promote diversity.
example_sentences.cn: 大学修改了招生政策以促进多样性。

definition_en: a fundamental truth or rule

example_sentences.en: The principle of natural selection is central to evolutionary biology.
example_sentences.cn: 自然选择原理是进化生物学的核心。

example_sentences.en: Democratic principles emphasize equality and freedom of speech.
example_sentences.cn: 民主原则强调平等和言论自由。

definition_en: a series of steps; to handle systematically

example_sentences.en: Photosynthesis is the process by which plants convert sunlight into energy.
example_sentences.cn: 光合作用是植物将阳光转化为能量的过程。

example_sentences.en: The brain processes visual information at remarkable speed.
example_sentences.cn: 大脑以惊人的速度处理视觉信息。

definition_en: need for a particular purpose

example_sentences.en: The experiment requires precise measurements of temperature and pressure.
example_sentences.cn: 该实验需要对温度和压力进行精确测量。

example_sentences.en: Graduate programs require students to complete a thesis.
example_sentences.cn: 研究生课程要求学生完成论文。

definition_en: systematic investigation to establish facts

example_sentences.en: Her research focuses on the effects of urbanization on wildlife.
example_sentences.cn: 她的研究集中在城市化对野生动物的影响上。

example_sentences.en: Scientists research potential treatments for autoimmune diseases.
example_sentences.cn: 科学家研究自身免疫疾病的潜在治疗方法。

definition_en: say or act in reply

example_sentences.en: Plants respond to environmental stimuli such as light and gravity.
example_sentences.cn: 植物对光和重力等环境刺激做出反应。

example_sentences.en: The government responded quickly to the natural disaster.
example_sentences.cn: 政府迅速对自然灾害做出了回应。

definition_en: the function assumed by someone or something

example_sentences.en: Technology plays an increasingly important role in education.
example_sentences.cn: 技术在教育中发挥着越来越重要的作用。

example_sentences.en: The role of government in regulating the economy is widely debated.
example_sentences.cn: 政府在调节经济中的作用被广泛讨论。

definition_en: sufficiently great or important to be worthy of attention

example_sentences.en: The study revealed a significant difference between the two groups.
example_sentences.cn: 该研究揭示了两组之间的显著差异。

example_sentences.en: Significant progress has been made in renewable energy technology.
example_sentences.cn: 可再生能源技术取得了显著进展。

definition_en: resembling without being identical

example_sentences.en: The two species exhibit similar behavioral patterns during migration.
example_sentences.cn: 这两个物种在迁徙过程中表现出相似的行为模式。

example_sentences.en: Similar results were observed in previous experiments.
example_sentences.cn: 在之前的实验中观察到了类似的结果。

definition_en: a place or thing from which something originates

example_sentences.en: Solar energy is a renewable source of power.
example_sentences.cn: 太阳能是一种可再生的能源。

example_sentences.en: Primary sources provide firsthand accounts of historical events.
example_sentences.cn: 一手资料提供历史事件的直接记录。

definition_en: clearly defined or identified; particular

example_sentences.en: The professor gave specific instructions for the lab experiment.
example_sentences.cn: 教授对实验给出了具体的指导说明。

example_sentences.en: Certain medications target specific receptors in the brain.
example_sentences.cn: 某些药物针对大脑中的特定受体。

definition_en: the arrangement of parts; to organize

example_sentences.en: The molecular structure of DNA was discovered in 1953.
example_sentences.cn: DNA的分子结构于1953年被发现。

example_sentences.en: The essay should be structured with a clear introduction and conclusion.
example_sentences.cn: 文章应该有清晰的引言和结论的结构。

definition_en: a system of ideas intended to explain something

example_sentences.en: Darwin's theory of evolution transformed our understanding of biology.
example_sentences.cn: 达尔文的进化论改变了我们对生物学的理解。

example_sentences.en: The theory must be supported by empirical evidence to be accepted.
example_sentences.cn: 该理论必须有实证证据支持才能被接受。

definition_en: differ in size, amount, or degree

example_sentences.en: Temperatures vary significantly between the equator and the poles.
example_sentences.cn: 赤道和两极之间的温度差异很大。

example_sentences.en: Cultural norms vary considerably across different societies.
example_sentences.cn: 文化规范在不同社会之间差异很大。

definition_en: successfully bring about or reach a desired result

example_sentences.en: Students who set clear goals are more likely to achieve academic success.
example_sentences.cn: 设定明确目标的学生更有可能取得学业成功。

example_sentences.en: The country achieved independence after decades of colonial rule.
example_sentences.cn: 该国在数十年的殖民统治后实现了独立。

definition_en: buy or obtain; learn or develop

example_sentences.en: Children acquire language skills rapidly during early development.
example_sentences.cn: 儿童在早期发育阶段快速习得语言技能。

example_sentences.en: The museum acquired a rare collection of ancient artifacts.
example_sentences.cn: 博物馆获得了一批珍稀的古代文物。

definition_en: consisting of many interconnected parts

example_sentences.en: The human brain is an extraordinarily complex organ.
example_sentences.cn: 人脑是一个异常复杂的器官。

example_sentences.en: Climate change involves complex interactions between multiple systems.
example_sentences.cn: 气候变化涉及多个系统之间的复杂交互。

definition_en: bring to an end; arrive at a judgment

example_sentences.en: The researchers concluded that early intervention improves outcomes.
example_sentences.cn: 研究人员得出结论，早期干预可以改善结果。

example_sentences.en: The lecture concluded with a summary of the key findings.
example_sentences.cn: 讲座以对主要发现的总结结束。

definition_en: carry out or organize

example_sentences.en: The team conducted a series of experiments over six months.
example_sentences.cn: 该团队在六个月内进行了一系列实验。

example_sentences.en: Surveys were conducted to gather public opinion on the issue.
example_sentences.cn: 进行了调查以收集公众对该问题的意见。

definition_en: a result or effect of an action

example_sentences.en: Deforestation has severe consequences for local ecosystems.
example_sentences.cn: 森林砍伐对当地生态系统造成严重后果。

example_sentences.en: One consequence of urbanization is increased air pollution.
example_sentences.cn: 城市化的一个后果是空气污染加剧。

definition_en: be composed or made up of

example_sentences.en: The committee consists of twelve elected members.
example_sentences.cn: 委员会由十二名选举产生的成员组成。

example_sentences.en: The atmosphere consists primarily of nitrogen and oxygen.
example_sentences.cn: 大气主要由氮气和氧气组成。

definition_en: the state of being strikingly different; to compare

example_sentences.en: In contrast to earlier studies, this research found no significant effect.
example_sentences.cn: 与早期研究相比，本研究没有发现显著效果。

example_sentences.en: The author contrasts rural and urban lifestyles in the novel.
example_sentences.cn: 作者在小说中对比了农村和城市的生活方式。

definition_en: give in order to help achieve something

example_sentences.en: Several factors contribute to the rise in global temperatures.
example_sentences.cn: 多种因素促成了全球气温的上升。

example_sentences.en: Volunteers contribute their time to community service projects.
example_sentences.cn: 志愿者将时间贡献给社区服务项目。

definition_en: the system of production and consumption of goods

example_sentences.en: The global economy experienced a recession following the financial crisis.
example_sentences.cn: 全球经济在金融危机后经历了衰退。

example_sentences.en: Tourism is a key driver of the local economy.
example_sentences.cn: 旅游业是当地经济的主要驱动力。

definition_en: special importance or prominence given to something

example_sentences.en: The curriculum places emphasis on critical thinking skills.
example_sentences.cn: 课程重视批判性思维技能。

example_sentences.en: There is increasing emphasis on sustainability in architecture.
example_sentences.cn: 建筑学越来越重视可持续性。

definition_en: make certain that something will occur

example_sentences.en: Quality control measures ensure the safety of food products.
example_sentences.cn: 质量控制措施确保食品安全。

example_sentences.en: The regulations are designed to ensure fair competition.
example_sentences.cn: 这些法规旨在确保公平竞争。

definition_en: goods sent to another country; to send goods abroad

example_sentences.en: Oil exports account for a large portion of the nation's GDP.
example_sentences.cn: 石油出口占该国GDP的很大比例。

example_sentences.en: The country exports agricultural products to over 50 nations.
example_sentences.cn: 该国向50多个国家出口农产品。

definition_en: a distinctive attribute or characteristic

example_sentences.en: A key feature of the Baroque style is its dramatic use of light.
example_sentences.cn: 巴洛克风格的一个主要特征是对光线的戏剧性运用。

example_sentences.en: The documentary features interviews with leading scientists.
example_sentences.cn: 这部纪录片以对著名科学家的采访为特色。

definition_en: the center of interest; to concentrate attention

example_sentences.en: The study focuses on the impact of social media on adolescents.
example_sentences.cn: 该研究聚焦于社交媒体对青少年的影响。

example_sentences.en: Environmental conservation has become a major focus of government policy.
example_sentences.cn: 环境保护已成为政府政策的主要焦点。

definition_en: money given for a purpose; to give or allow

example_sentences.en: The research team received a federal grant to fund their project.
example_sentences.cn: 研究团队获得了联邦拨款资助其项目。

example_sentences.en: The government granted permission to build the new facility.
example_sentences.cn: 政府批准建造新设施。

definition_en: explain or make clear by using examples

example_sentences.en: The experiment illustrates the principle of conservation of energy.
example_sentences.cn: 该实验说明了能量守恒原理。

example_sentences.en: The professor used several case studies to illustrate her point.
example_sentences.cn: 教授用几个案例研究来阐明她的观点。

definition_en: a strong effect; to have a strong effect on

example_sentences.en: Human activity has had a profound impact on the natural world.
example_sentences.cn: 人类活动对自然界产生了深远影响。

example_sentences.en: The new technology will significantly impact the healthcare industry.
example_sentences.cn: 新技术将显著影响医疗保健行业。

definition_en: money received for work or through investments

example_sentences.en: The gap between high and low income earners continues to widen.
example_sentences.cn: 高收入和低收入者之间的差距继续扩大。

example_sentences.en: Household income levels affect access to healthcare services.
example_sentences.cn: 家庭收入水平影响医疗服务的可及性。

definition_en: existing or occurring at the beginning

example_sentences.en: The initial results of the study were promising but inconclusive.
example_sentences.cn: 研究的初步结果令人鼓舞但尚无定论。

example_sentences.en: After the initial shock, the community began to rebuild.
example_sentences.cn: 在最初的冲击之后，社区开始重建。

definition_en: an example or single occurrence

example_sentences.en: For instance, coral reefs support over 25 percent of all marine species.
example_sentences.cn: 例如，珊瑚礁支撑着超过25%的海洋物种。

example_sentences.en: There have been several instances of data manipulation in this field.
example_sentences.cn: 该领域已有多起数据操纵的案例。

definition_en: put money or effort into something for future benefit

example_sentences.en: Countries that invest in education tend to have stronger economies.
example_sentences.cn: 投资教育的国家往往拥有更强的经济。

example_sentences.en: The company invested heavily in renewable energy research.
example_sentences.cn: 该公司在可再生能源研究上投入了大量资金。

definition_en: physical or mental work; the workforce

example_sentences.en: The Industrial Revolution transformed the nature of labor.
example_sentences.cn: 工业革命改变了劳动的性质。

example_sentences.en: Skilled labor is essential for the growth of the technology sector.
example_sentences.cn: 技术熟练的劳动力对科技行业的增长至关重要。

definition_en: relating to the law; permitted by law

example_sentences.en: The legal framework for intellectual property varies between countries.
example_sentences.cn: 知识产权的法律框架因国家而异。

example_sentences.en: Immigration raises complex legal and ethical questions.
example_sentences.cn: 移民引发了复杂的法律和伦理问题。

definition_en: cause to continue; keep in a certain state

example_sentences.en: It is important to maintain a balance between work and personal life.
example_sentences.cn: 保持工作与个人生活的平衡很重要。

example_sentences.en: The body maintains a constant internal temperature of about 37°C.
example_sentences.cn: 人体维持约37°C的恒定体温。

definition_en: get or acquire

example_sentences.en: Researchers obtained permission from the ethics committee before beginning.
example_sentences.cn: 研究人员在开始之前获得了伦理委员会的许可。

example_sentences.en: Data was obtained through a series of laboratory tests.
example_sentences.cn: 数据是通过一系列实验室测试获得的。

definition_en: take part in

example_sentences.en: Over 500 students participated in the nationwide survey.
example_sentences.cn: 超过500名学生参加了这项全国调查。

example_sentences.en: Citizens are encouraged to participate in community planning.
example_sentences.cn: 鼓励市民参与社区规划。

definition_en: become aware of through the senses; regard as

example_sentences.en: Humans perceive color through specialized cells in the retina.
example_sentences.cn: 人类通过视网膜中的特化细胞感知颜色。

example_sentences.en: The policy was perceived as unfair by many citizens.
example_sentences.cn: 许多市民认为该政策不公平。

definition_en: constructive, confident, or favorable

example_sentences.en: The results showed a positive correlation between exercise and mood.
example_sentences.cn: 结果显示锻炼与情绪之间存在正相关。

example_sentences.en: Early intervention can have a positive impact on child development.
example_sentences.cn: 早期干预可以对儿童发展产生积极影响。

definition_en: having the capacity to develop; latent possibility

example_sentences.en: Renewable energy has the potential to replace fossil fuels entirely.
example_sentences.cn: 可再生能源有完全取代化石燃料的潜力。

example_sentences.en: The professor recognized the student's potential for advanced research.
example_sentences.cn: 教授认识到了这个学生进行高级研究的潜力。

definition_en: existing or occurring before in time

example_sentences.en: Previous research has shown a link between poverty and poor health.
example_sentences.cn: 先前的研究已经证明贫困与健康状况差之间存在联系。

example_sentences.en: The current findings contradict previous assumptions about the topic.
example_sentences.cn: 目前的发现与之前关于该主题的假设相矛盾。

definition_en: of chief importance; first in order

example_sentences.en: The primary goal of the experiment was to test the new hypothesis.
example_sentences.cn: 实验的首要目标是测试新假设。

example_sentences.en: Agriculture remains the primary source of income in rural areas.
example_sentences.cn: 农业仍然是农村地区的主要收入来源。

definition_en: support or encourage; advance in position

example_sentences.en: Exercise promotes cardiovascular health and reduces stress.
example_sentences.cn: 锻炼促进心血管健康并减轻压力。

example_sentences.en: The campaign promotes awareness of environmental issues.
example_sentences.cn: 该活动旨在提高人们对环境问题的认识。

definition_en: a part or share of a whole; a ratio

example_sentences.en: A large proportion of the population lives below the poverty line.
example_sentences.cn: 很大一部分人口生活在贫困线以下。

example_sentences.en: The proportion of renewable energy in the total mix is growing.
example_sentences.cn: 可再生能源在总能源中的比例正在增长。

definition_en: make available to the public; print in a journal

example_sentences.en: The findings were published in a leading scientific journal.
example_sentences.cn: 这些发现发表在一家顶级科学期刊上。

example_sentences.en: The university publishes a quarterly review of current research.
example_sentences.cn: 该大学出版季度研究综述。

definition_en: the scope or extent; to vary between limits

example_sentences.en: Temperatures range from -10°C in winter to 35°C in summer.
example_sentences.cn: 温度从冬季的-10°C到夏季的35°C不等。

example_sentences.en: The museum displays a wide range of ancient artifacts.
example_sentences.cn: 博物馆展示了各种各样的古代文物。

definition_en: an area with definable characteristics

example_sentences.en: The Arctic region is experiencing rapid climate change.
example_sentences.cn: 北极地区正在经历快速的气候变化。

example_sentences.en: Different regions of the brain control different functions.
example_sentences.cn: 大脑的不同区域控制不同的功能。

definition_en: control or supervise by means of rules

example_sentences.en: Hormones regulate many of the body's essential processes.
example_sentences.cn: 激素调节身体的许多基本过程。

example_sentences.en: The government regulates the financial industry to prevent fraud.
example_sentences.cn: 政府监管金融行业以防止欺诈。

definition_en: closely connected or appropriate to the matter

example_sentences.en: Only relevant data should be included in the analysis.
example_sentences.cn: 分析中应只包含相关数据。

example_sentences.en: The course covers topics relevant to current industry practice.
example_sentences.cn: 该课程涵盖与当前行业实践相关的主题。

definition_en: depend on with full trust

example_sentences.en: Many developing nations rely heavily on foreign aid.
example_sentences.cn: 许多发展中国家严重依赖外国援助。

example_sentences.en: Scientists rely on peer review to validate research findings.
example_sentences.cn: 科学家依靠同行评审来验证研究结果。

definition_en: take away from a position or place

example_sentences.en: The surgeon removed the tumor successfully.
example_sentences.cn: 外科医生成功地切除了肿瘤。

example_sentences.en: Regulations were introduced to remove barriers to trade.
example_sentences.cn: 出台了法规以消除贸易壁垒。

definition_en: a supply of something that can be drawn on

example_sentences.en: Water is one of Earth's most precious natural resources.
example_sentences.cn: 水是地球上最珍贵的自然资源之一。

example_sentences.en: The library provides extensive digital resources for students.
example_sentences.cn: 图书馆为学生提供丰富的数字资源。

definition_en: put a limit on; keep under control

example_sentences.en: Zoning laws restrict the types of buildings allowed in certain areas.
example_sentences.cn: 分区法规限制了某些区域允许的建筑类型。

example_sentences.en: The disease restricts blood flow to the brain.
example_sentences.cn: 这种疾病限制了流向大脑的血流。

definition_en: make previously unknown information known

example_sentences.en: The excavation revealed the remains of an ancient settlement.
example_sentences.cn: 挖掘揭示了一个古代定居点的遗迹。

example_sentences.en: DNA analysis revealed new insights into human migration patterns.
example_sentences.cn: DNA分析揭示了人类迁徙模式的新见解。

definition_en: safe from threat; to obtain or fix firmly

example_sentences.en: The team secured funding for a three-year research project.
example_sentences.cn: 团队为一个三年研究项目获得了资金。

example_sentences.en: Encryption technology helps secure personal data online.
example_sentences.cn: 加密技术有助于保护在线个人数据安全。

definition_en: attempt to find or obtain

example_sentences.en: Many immigrants seek better opportunities in new countries.
example_sentences.cn: 许多移民在新的国家寻求更好的机会。

example_sentences.en: Researchers seek to understand the mechanisms behind aging.
example_sentences.cn: 研究人员寻求了解衰老背后的机制。

definition_en: carefully choose as being the best or most suitable

example_sentences.en: Participants were selected randomly from the student population.
example_sentences.cn: 参与者从学生群体中随机抽选。

example_sentences.en: Natural selection favors organisms best adapted to their environment.
example_sentences.cn: 自然选择有利于最适应其环境的生物体。

definition_en: a change in position or direction; to move

example_sentences.en: There has been a significant shift in public opinion on climate change.
example_sentences.cn: 公众对气候变化的看法发生了重大转变。

example_sentences.en: The tectonic plates shift slowly over millions of years.
example_sentences.cn: 构造板块在数百万年间缓慢移动。

definition_en: a plan of action designed to achieve a goal

example_sentences.en: The company developed a new strategy for entering the Asian market.
example_sentences.cn: 公司制定了进入亚洲市场的新策略。

example_sentences.en: Effective study strategies can improve academic performance.
example_sentences.cn: 有效的学习策略可以提高学业表现。

definition_en: enough; adequate for a particular need

example_sentences.en: Sufficient evidence must be provided to support the hypothesis.
example_sentences.cn: 必须提供充分的证据来支持假设。

example_sentences.en: The patient did not receive sufficient nutrition during recovery.
example_sentences.cn: 患者在恢复期间没有获得充足的营养。

definition_en: an investigation of opinions; to examine comprehensively

example_sentences.en: A nationwide survey found that stress levels among students are rising.
example_sentences.cn: 一项全国调查发现学生的压力水平正在上升。

example_sentences.en: Geologists surveyed the area to assess earthquake risk.
example_sentences.cn: 地质学家勘测了该地区以评估地震风险。

definition_en: cause to continue; strengthen or support

example_sentences.en: The ecosystem cannot sustain such rapid population growth.
example_sentences.cn: 生态系统无法维持如此快速的人口增长。

example_sentences.en: Athletes need proper nutrition to sustain high levels of performance.
example_sentences.cn: 运动员需要适当的营养来维持高水平的表现。

definition_en: a long-established custom or belief

example_sentences.en: Many cultural traditions are passed down through oral storytelling.
example_sentences.cn: 许多文化传统通过口头叙事代代相传。

example_sentences.en: The university has a strong tradition of academic excellence.
example_sentences.cn: 该大学有着优秀学术的悠久传统。

definition_en: move from one place to another

example_sentences.en: Heat is transferred from the sun to the Earth through radiation.
example_sentences.cn: 热量通过辐射从太阳传递到地球。

example_sentences.en: The transfer of knowledge between generations is vital for cultural preservation.
example_sentences.cn: 代际知识传递对文化保存至关重要。

definition_en: a general direction of change

example_sentences.en: Recent trends show a decline in biodiversity worldwide.
example_sentences.cn: 最近的趋势显示全球生物多样性在下降。

example_sentences.en: The trend toward remote work has accelerated since the pandemic.
example_sentences.cn: 远程工作的趋势自疫情以来加速了。

definition_en: give up completely; leave behind

example_sentences.en: The settlers were forced to abandon the colony due to harsh conditions.
example_sentences.cn: 由于恶劣的条件，定居者被迫放弃了殖民地。

example_sentences.en: Scientists abandoned the theory after new evidence emerged.
example_sentences.cn: 新证据出现后，科学家们放弃了该理论。

definition_en: existing in thought rather than matter; a summary

example_sentences.en: Mathematics deals with abstract concepts like infinity and sets.
example_sentences.cn: 数学处理诸如无穷和集合等抽象概念。

example_sentences.en: The abstract of the paper summarizes the key findings.
example_sentences.cn: 论文摘要概述了主要发现。

definition_en: provide space for; adjust to

example_sentences.en: The new building can accommodate up to 500 students.
example_sentences.cn: 新大楼可容纳多达500名学生。

example_sentences.en: Teachers must accommodate different learning styles in the classroom.
example_sentences.cn: 教师必须在课堂上适应不同的学习风格。

definition_en: gather together or acquire over time

example_sentences.en: Sediment accumulates at the bottom of the ocean over millennia.
example_sentences.cn: 沉积物在数千年间积聚在海底。

example_sentences.en: Students accumulate knowledge through consistent study habits.
example_sentences.cn: 学生通过持续的学习习惯积累知识。

definition_en: accept or recognize the existence or truth of

example_sentences.en: The author acknowledged the limitations of the study.
example_sentences.cn: 作者承认了该研究的局限性。

example_sentences.en: It is important to acknowledge cultural differences in communication.
example_sentences.cn: 在交流中认识到文化差异是重要的。

definition_en: modify to suit new conditions

example_sentences.en: Species must adapt to changing environmental conditions to survive.
example_sentences.cn: 物种必须适应不断变化的环境条件才能生存。

example_sentences.en: The curriculum was adapted to meet the needs of international students.
example_sentences.cn: 课程经过调整以满足国际学生的需求。

definition_en: sufficient for a specific requirement

example_sentences.en: Adequate sleep is essential for cognitive function and memory.
example_sentences.cn: 充足的睡眠对认知功能和记忆至关重要。

example_sentences.en: The project lacked adequate funding to be completed on time.
example_sentences.cn: 该项目缺乏足够的资金按时完成。

definition_en: publicly recommend or support; a supporter

example_sentences.en: Many scientists advocate for stronger environmental regulations.
example_sentences.cn: 许多科学家提倡更严格的环境法规。

example_sentences.en: She became a leading advocate for women's education rights.
example_sentences.cn: 她成为女性教育权利的主要倡导者。

definition_en: a whole formed by combining elements; to collect

example_sentences.en: The aggregate score determines the final ranking of candidates.
example_sentences.cn: 总分决定了候选人的最终排名。

example_sentences.en: Data is aggregated from multiple sources for comprehensive analysis.
example_sentences.cn: 数据从多个来源汇总进行综合分析。

definition_en: distribute resources for a particular purpose

example_sentences.en: The government allocated additional funds for public health programs.
example_sentences.cn: 政府为公共卫生项目拨款了额外资金。

example_sentences.en: Resources should be allocated based on community needs.
example_sentences.cn: 资源应根据社区需求进行分配。

definition_en: change in character or composition

example_sentences.en: Human activity has drastically altered the landscape of the region.
example_sentences.cn: 人类活动已大幅改变了该地区的地貌。

example_sentences.en: Genetic mutations can alter the function of proteins in the body.
example_sentences.cn: 基因突变可以改变体内蛋白质的功能。

definition_en: open to more than one interpretation

example_sentences.en: The results were ambiguous and required further investigation.
example_sentences.cn: 结果模棱两可，需要进一步调查。

example_sentences.en: Ambiguous language in contracts can lead to legal disputes.
example_sentences.cn: 合同中含糊的语言可能导致法律纠纷。

definition_en: a comparison between things for explanation

example_sentences.en: The professor used an analogy between the brain and a computer.
example_sentences.cn: 教授使用了大脑和计算机之间的类比。

example_sentences.en: Reasoning by analogy is a powerful tool in scientific discovery.
example_sentences.cn: 类比推理是科学发现的有力工具。

definition_en: regard as probable; expect

example_sentences.en: Economists anticipate a slowdown in growth next quarter.
example_sentences.cn: 经济学家预计下一季度增长将放缓。

example_sentences.en: Engineers must anticipate potential failures in their designs.
example_sentences.cn: 工程师必须预见其设计中的潜在故障。

definition_en: clearly visible or understood; seeming

example_sentences.en: The apparent contradiction between the two theories puzzled researchers.
example_sentences.cn: 两种理论之间的明显矛盾使研究人员困惑。

example_sentences.en: It became apparent that the original data contained errors.
example_sentences.cn: 原始数据包含错误这一点变得显而易见。

definition_en: recognize the full worth of; understand

example_sentences.en: Students learn to appreciate the complexity of ecological systems.
example_sentences.cn: 学生学会欣赏生态系统的复杂性。

example_sentences.en: It is important to appreciate cultural differences when studying abroad.
example_sentences.cn: 留学时重视文化差异很重要。

definition_en: based on random choice rather than reason

example_sentences.en: The selection criteria appeared to be arbitrary rather than merit-based.
example_sentences.cn: 选择标准似乎是任意的，而非基于能力的。

example_sentences.en: Arbitrary decisions can undermine trust in institutions.
example_sentences.cn: 武断的决定会削弱对机构的信任。

definition_en: regard as being caused by; a quality

example_sentences.en: Historians attribute the fall of the empire to internal corruption.
example_sentences.cn: 历史学家将帝国的衰落归因于内部腐败。

example_sentences.en: Creativity is an important attribute for problem-solving.
example_sentences.cn: 创造力是解决问题的重要属性。

definition_en: a connection or link; to join securely

example_sentences.en: Chemical bonds hold atoms together in molecules.
example_sentences.cn: 化学键将原子结合在分子中。

example_sentences.en: Strong bonds between parent and child form during early infancy.
example_sentences.cn: 父母与孩子之间的紧密纽带在婴儿早期形成。

definition_en: having the ability or quality necessary

example_sentences.en: Modern computers are capable of processing billions of calculations per second.
example_sentences.cn: 现代计算机每秒能够处理数十亿次计算。

example_sentences.en: The new telescope is capable of detecting distant galaxies.
example_sentences.cn: 新望远镜能够探测到遥远的星系。

definition_en: the maximum amount something can contain; ability

example_sentences.en: The stadium has a capacity of over 60,000 spectators.
example_sentences.cn: 该体育场可容纳超过60,000名观众。

example_sentences.en: The human brain has an enormous capacity for learning.
example_sentences.cn: 人脑具有巨大的学习能力。

definition_en: come or bring to an end

example_sentences.en: The factory ceased operations due to environmental violations.
example_sentences.cn: 工厂因环境违规而停止运营。

example_sentences.en: Hostilities ceased after the peace agreement was signed.
example_sentences.cn: 和平协议签署后，敌对行动停止了。

definition_en: a demanding task; to dispute or call into question

example_sentences.en: Climate change presents a significant challenge to global food security.
example_sentences.cn: 气候变化对全球粮食安全构成重大挑战。

example_sentences.en: New discoveries challenged the prevailing scientific paradigm.
example_sentences.cn: 新发现挑战了当时主流的科学范式。

definition_en: a medium for communication; to direct toward

example_sentences.en: Rivers channel water from mountain regions to the sea.
example_sentences.cn: 河流将水从山区引向大海。

example_sentences.en: Social media has become an important channel for scientific communication.
example_sentences.cn: 社交媒体已成为科学传播的重要渠道。

definition_en: relating to chemistry; a substance

example_sentences.en: Chemical reactions in the atmosphere contribute to ozone depletion.
example_sentences.cn: 大气中的化学反应导致臭氧层消耗。

example_sentences.en: Exposure to toxic chemicals can cause serious health problems.
example_sentences.cn: 接触有毒化学物质可能导致严重的健康问题。

definition_en: make a statement less confused and more comprehensible

example_sentences.en: The professor asked the student to clarify his research question.
example_sentences.cn: 教授让学生澄清他的研究问题。

example_sentences.en: Further experiments are needed to clarify the mechanism involved.
example_sentences.cn: 需要进一步实验来阐明所涉及的机制。

definition_en: logical and consistent; forming a unified whole

example_sentences.en: A coherent argument is essential for a strong academic essay.
example_sentences.cn: 连贯的论证对于一篇有力的学术论文至关重要。

example_sentences.en: The team developed a coherent strategy for addressing the issue.
example_sentences.cn: 团队制定了一项解决该问题的连贯策略。

definition_en: occur at the same time or place

example_sentences.en: The rise in obesity coincides with increased consumption of processed food.
example_sentences.cn: 肥胖率上升与加工食品消费增加同时发生。

example_sentences.en: Her findings coincide with those of earlier researchers.
example_sentences.cn: 她的发现与早期研究者的发现一致。

definition_en: fall down suddenly; a sudden failure

example_sentences.en: The bridge collapsed under the weight of the heavy trucks.
example_sentences.cn: 桥梁在重型卡车的重量下倒塌了。

example_sentences.en: The economic collapse of 2008 had worldwide consequences.
example_sentences.cn: 2008年的经济崩溃产生了全球性后果。

definition_en: begin; start

example_sentences.en: Construction will commence once all permits are obtained.
example_sentences.cn: 一旦获得所有许可证，建设将开始。

example_sentences.en: The ceremony commenced with a brief welcome address.
example_sentences.cn: 仪式以简短的欢迎致辞开始。

definition_en: a raw material or primary agricultural product

example_sentences.en: Oil is one of the most traded commodities in the world.
example_sentences.cn: 石油是世界上交易量最大的商品之一。

example_sentences.en: Commodity prices fluctuate based on supply and demand.
example_sentences.cn: 商品价格根据供需关系波动。

definition_en: make up for something; provide payment

example_sentences.en: The company compensated employees for overtime work.
example_sentences.cn: 公司补偿了员工的加班工作。

example_sentences.en: The brain compensates for damage by rewiring neural pathways.
example_sentences.cn: 大脑通过重新连接神经通路来弥补损伤。

definition_en: produce by assembling information from various sources

example_sentences.en: Researchers compiled data from over 200 clinical trials.
example_sentences.cn: 研究人员汇编了200多项临床试验的数据。

example_sentences.en: The team compiled a comprehensive bibliography on the subject.
example_sentences.cn: 团队编纂了该主题的综合书目。

definition_en: add to in a way that enhances; something that completes

example_sentences.en: The two research methods complement each other effectively.
example_sentences.cn: 这两种研究方法有效地互相补充。

example_sentences.en: Practical experience is a natural complement to theoretical knowledge.
example_sentences.cn: 实践经验是理论知识的自然补充。

definition_en: complete; including all elements

example_sentences.en: The report provides a comprehensive overview of current trends.
example_sentences.cn: 该报告提供了当前趋势的全面概述。

example_sentences.en: A comprehensive approach to healthcare includes prevention and treatment.
example_sentences.cn: 全面的医疗保健方法包括预防和治疗。

definition_en: form an idea or plan in the mind

example_sentences.en: Einstein conceived the theory of relativity while working as a clerk.
example_sentences.cn: 爱因斯坦在担任职员时构想了相对论。

example_sentences.en: It is difficult to conceive of a world without digital technology.
example_sentences.cn: 很难想象一个没有数字技术的世界。

definition_en: existing or happening at the same time

example_sentences.en: The concurrent rise in temperature and CO2 levels is well documented.
example_sentences.cn: 温度和二氧化碳水平同时上升已有充分记录。

example_sentences.en: Students can enroll in concurrent degree programs.
example_sentences.cn: 学生可以注册双学位课程。

definition_en: grant a title or benefit; have discussions

example_sentences.en: The degree was conferred upon graduates at the ceremony.
example_sentences.cn: 学位在毕业典礼上授予毕业生。

example_sentences.en: Vaccination confers immunity against certain diseases.
example_sentences.cn: 接种疫苗赋予对某些疾病的免疫力。

definition_en: keep within certain limits; restrict

example_sentences.en: The study was confined to participants aged 18 to 25.
example_sentences.cn: 该研究仅限于18至25岁的参与者。

example_sentences.en: Animals confined to small spaces often exhibit abnormal behaviors.
example_sentences.cn: 被限制在小空间里的动物通常会表现出异常行为。

definition_en: comply with rules or standards

example_sentences.en: All products must conform to international safety standards.
example_sentences.cn: 所有产品必须符合国际安全标准。

example_sentences.en: Social pressure can cause individuals to conform to group norms.
example_sentences.cn: 社会压力可能导致个人遵从群体规范。

definition_en: permission or agreement; to give permission

example_sentences.en: Informed consent is required from all research participants.
example_sentences.cn: 所有研究参与者都需要知情同意。

example_sentences.en: The patient consented to the experimental treatment.
example_sentences.cn: 患者同意接受实验性治疗。

definition_en: notably large in size, amount, or extent

example_sentences.en: The project required a considerable investment of time and resources.
example_sentences.cn: 该项目需要投入大量的时间和资源。

example_sentences.en: There is considerable debate about the effectiveness of the policy.
example_sentences.cn: 关于该政策的有效性存在相当大的争论。

definition_en: occurring continuously; an unchanging quantity

example_sentences.en: The speed of light is a fundamental constant in physics.
example_sentences.cn: 光速是物理学中的基本常数。

example_sentences.en: Constant exposure to noise pollution affects hearing ability.
example_sentences.cn: 持续暴露在噪音污染中会影响听力。

definition_en: restrict the scope or freedom of

example_sentences.en: Budget limitations constrain the scope of the research project.
example_sentences.cn: 预算限制约束了研究项目的范围。

example_sentences.en: Social norms constrain individual behavior in various ways.
example_sentences.cn: 社会规范以各种方式约束个人行为。

definition_en: seek information or advice from

example_sentences.en: Students should consult their advisors before selecting courses.
example_sentences.cn: 学生在选课前应咨询导师。

example_sentences.en: The government consulted with experts before implementing the policy.
example_sentences.cn: 政府在实施政策前咨询了专家。

definition_en: living or occurring at the same time; modern

example_sentences.en: Contemporary art often challenges traditional aesthetic conventions.
example_sentences.cn: 当代艺术常常挑战传统美学惯例。

example_sentences.en: Shakespeare was a contemporary of Queen Elizabeth I.
example_sentences.cn: 莎士比亚与伊丽莎白一世是同时代的人。

definition_en: deny the truth of; be in conflict with

example_sentences.en: The new findings contradict the conclusions of earlier studies.
example_sentences.cn: 新发现与早期研究的结论相矛盾。

example_sentences.en: Eyewitness accounts often contradict each other.
example_sentences.cn: 目击者的叙述经常互相矛盾。

definition_en: prolonged public disagreement or debate

example_sentences.en: The use of genetically modified organisms remains a source of controversy.
example_sentences.cn: 转基因生物的使用仍然是争议的来源。

example_sentences.en: The discovery sparked controversy among the scientific community.
example_sentences.cn: 这一发现在科学界引发了争议。

definition_en: a widely used practice; a formal meeting

example_sentences.en: Academic writing follows certain conventions regarding citations.
example_sentences.cn: 学术写作遵循关于引用的某些惯例。

example_sentences.en: The convention brought together scientists from 30 countries.
example_sentences.cn: 大会聚集了来自30个国家的科学家。

definition_en: change the form or function of

example_sentences.en: Solar panels convert sunlight into electrical energy.
example_sentences.cn: 太阳能板将阳光转化为电能。

example_sentences.en: The factory was converted into a modern art museum.
example_sentences.cn: 工厂被改建为现代艺术博物馆。

definition_en: cause someone to believe firmly

example_sentences.en: The evidence convinced the jury of the defendant's innocence.
example_sentences.cn: 证据使陪审团相信被告是无辜的。

example_sentences.en: It is difficult to convince people to change long-held beliefs.
example_sentences.cn: 要说服人们改变长期持有的信念是困难的。

definition_en: work jointly toward the same end

example_sentences.en: Nations must cooperate to address global challenges like climate change.
example_sentences.cn: 各国必须合作应对气候变化等全球挑战。

example_sentences.en: The two departments cooperated on a joint research project.
example_sentences.cn: 两个部门在一个联合研究项目上进行了合作。

definition_en: the central or most important part

example_sentences.en: Critical thinking is a core skill in higher education.
example_sentences.cn: 批判性思维是高等教育的核心技能。

example_sentences.en: The Earth's core is composed primarily of iron and nickel.
example_sentences.cn: 地球的核心主要由铁和镍组成。

definition_en: relating to a large company or group

example_sentences.en: Corporate responsibility includes environmental stewardship.
example_sentences.cn: 企业责任包括环境管理。

example_sentences.en: The corporate structure was reorganized to improve efficiency.
example_sentences.cn: 企业结构经过重组以提高效率。

definition_en: have a close similarity; exchange letters

example_sentences.en: The symptoms correspond to those described in the medical literature.
example_sentences.cn: 症状与医学文献中描述的相符。

example_sentences.en: Each number on the scale corresponds to a specific pH level.
example_sentences.cn: 刻度上的每个数字对应特定的pH值。

definition_en: standards by which something is judged (plural of criterion)

example_sentences.en: Strict criteria were established for selecting research participants.
example_sentences.cn: 为选择研究参与者制定了严格的标准。

example_sentences.en: The project meets all the criteria for federal funding.
example_sentences.cn: 该项目满足联邦资助的所有标准。

definition_en: of great importance; critical

example_sentences.en: Water quality is crucial for maintaining healthy aquatic ecosystems.
example_sentences.cn: 水质对维持健康的水生生态系统至关重要。

example_sentences.en: The first few years of life are crucial for brain development.
example_sentences.cn: 生命的最初几年对大脑发育至关重要。

definition_en: a system of money; the state of being current

example_sentences.en: Currency exchange rates affect international trade significantly.
example_sentences.cn: 汇率对国际贸易有显著影响。

example_sentences.en: The research has currency because it addresses a timely issue.
example_sentences.cn: 这项研究具有时效性，因为它涉及一个及时的问题。

definition_en: a series of events that are regularly repeated

example_sentences.en: The water cycle is fundamental to understanding Earth's climate.
example_sentences.cn: 水循环对理解地球气候至关重要。

example_sentences.en: Economic cycles of boom and bust have occurred throughout history.
example_sentences.cn: 经济繁荣和萧条的周期贯穿整个历史。

definition_en: a formal discussion; to argue about

example_sentences.en: The debate over nuclear energy continues to divide public opinion.
example_sentences.cn: 关于核能的辩论继续分裂公众舆论。

example_sentences.en: Scholars debate whether the policy has achieved its intended goals.
example_sentences.cn: 学者们辩论该政策是否实现了预期目标。

definition_en: a period of ten years

example_sentences.en: Over the past decade, technology has transformed education.
example_sentences.cn: 在过去十年中，技术改变了教育。

example_sentences.en: Sea levels have risen measurably in the last few decades.
example_sentences.cn: 在过去几十年中，海平面明显上升。

definition_en: decrease; become smaller or fewer

example_sentences.en: Bee populations have declined sharply due to pesticide use.
example_sentences.cn: 由于杀虫剂的使用，蜜蜂种群急剧下降。

example_sentences.en: The decline of manufacturing led to unemployment in the region.
example_sentences.cn: 制造业的衰退导致该地区的失业。

definition_en: arrive at a conclusion by reasoning

example_sentences.en: Scientists deduced the age of the fossil from the surrounding rock layers.
example_sentences.cn: 科学家从周围的岩层推断出化石的年代。

example_sentences.en: From the data, we can deduce that the treatment was effective.
example_sentences.cn: 从数据中，我们可以推断该治疗方法是有效的。

definition_en: clearly show the existence or truth of

example_sentences.en: The experiment demonstrated that light travels in waves.
example_sentences.cn: 实验证明了光以波的形式传播。

example_sentences.en: Studies demonstrate a clear link between education and economic growth.
example_sentences.cn: 研究证明了教育与经济增长之间的明确联系。

definition_en: refuse to admit the truth of; reject

example_sentences.en: The company denied responsibility for the environmental damage.
example_sentences.cn: 该公司否认对环境破坏负有责任。

example_sentences.en: It is impossible to deny the impact of technology on modern life.
example_sentences.cn: 不可能否认技术对现代生活的影响。

definition_en: a mental condition of low mood; an economic downturn

example_sentences.en: The Great Depression of the 1930s affected economies worldwide.
example_sentences.cn: 20世纪30年代的大萧条影响了全球经济。

example_sentences.en: Research shows that exercise can help alleviate symptoms of depression.
example_sentences.cn: 研究表明锻炼可以帮助缓解抑郁症状。

definition_en: a thing made for a particular purpose; a technique

example_sentences.en: Wearable devices can monitor heart rate and physical activity.
example_sentences.cn: 可穿戴设备可以监测心率和身体活动。

example_sentences.en: The author uses symbolism as a literary device throughout the novel.
example_sentences.cn: 作者在整部小说中使用象征手义作为文学手法。

definition_en: give time or resources to a purpose

example_sentences.en: She devoted her career to studying endangered species.
example_sentences.cn: 她把职业生涯献给了研究濒危物种。

example_sentences.en: The chapter is devoted to the analysis of economic data.
example_sentences.cn: 这一章专门分析经济数据。

definition_en: an aspect or feature of a situation; a measurable extent

example_sentences.en: The social dimension of climate change is often overlooked.
example_sentences.cn: 气候变化的社会维度经常被忽视。

example_sentences.en: The model considers multiple dimensions of student performance.
example_sentences.cn: 该模型考虑了学生表现的多个维度。

definition_en: make or become less

example_sentences.en: The effectiveness of the drug diminishes over time.
example_sentences.cn: 该药物的效果随时间减弱。

example_sentences.en: Overfishing has diminished fish stocks in many ocean regions.
example_sentences.cn: 过度捕鱼已经减少了许多海洋地区的鱼类资源。

definition_en: individually separate and distinct

example_sentences.en: The project was divided into three discrete phases.
example_sentences.cn: 该项目被分为三个独立的阶段。

example_sentences.en: Atoms exist as discrete units of matter.
example_sentences.cn: 原子作为离散的物质单位存在。

definition_en: take the place of; force to move

example_sentences.en: Renewable energy sources are gradually displacing fossil fuels.
example_sentences.cn: 可再生能源正在逐步取代化石燃料。

example_sentences.en: The flood displaced thousands of families from their homes.
example_sentences.cn: 洪水迫使数千个家庭离开家园。

definition_en: recognizably different; clear and unmistakable

example_sentences.en: The two species are distinct in their feeding behaviors.
example_sentences.cn: 这两个物种在觅食行为上是不同的。

example_sentences.en: There is a distinct pattern in the data that supports the hypothesis.
example_sentences.cn: 数据中有一个支持该假设的明显模式。

definition_en: give a misleading account; pull out of shape

example_sentences.en: Media coverage can distort public perception of scientific issues.
example_sentences.cn: 媒体报道可能扭曲公众对科学问题的认知。

example_sentences.en: Gravity distorts the fabric of space-time around massive objects.
example_sentences.cn: 引力使大质量物体周围的时空结构发生扭曲。

definition_en: showing a great deal of variety

example_sentences.en: Tropical rainforests are home to an incredibly diverse range of species.
example_sentences.cn: 热带雨林是种类极其多样的物种的家园。

example_sentences.en: A diverse workforce brings different perspectives to problem-solving.
example_sentences.cn: 多元化的劳动力为解决问题带来不同的视角。

definition_en: record in detail; a written record

example_sentences.en: Researchers documented the effects of pollution on marine life.
example_sentences.cn: 研究人员记录了污染对海洋生物的影响。

example_sentences.en: Historical documents provide insight into life in ancient civilizations.
example_sentences.cn: 历史文献提供了对古代文明生活的洞察。

definition_en: an area of territory or knowledge

example_sentences.en: Artificial intelligence is advancing rapidly across multiple domains.
example_sentences.cn: 人工智能在多个领域快速发展。

example_sentences.en: The study falls within the domain of cognitive psychology.
example_sentences.cn: 这项研究属于认知心理学的领域。

definition_en: relating to one's own country; relating to the home

example_sentences.en: Domestic policy focuses on issues within the country's borders.
example_sentences.cn: 国内政策关注国家境内的问题。

example_sentences.en: The domestication of animals was a turning point in human history.
example_sentences.cn: 动物的驯化是人类历史的转折点。

definition_en: most influential or important; ruling

example_sentences.en: English has become the dominant language in international science.
example_sentences.cn: 英语已成为国际科学中的主导语言。

example_sentences.en: The dominant species in an ecosystem can shape the entire community.
example_sentences.cn: 生态系统中的优势物种可以塑造整个群落。

definition_en: a preliminary version; to prepare a plan

example_sentences.en: The first draft of the paper was submitted for peer review.
example_sentences.cn: 论文初稿已提交同行评审。

example_sentences.en: The committee drafted new guidelines for ethical research.
example_sentences.cn: 委员会起草了新的道德研究指南。

definition_en: the time during which something continues

example_sentences.en: The duration of the experiment was approximately six weeks.
example_sentences.cn: 实验持续时间大约为六周。

example_sentences.en: The duration of the ice age varied across different regions.
example_sentences.cn: 冰河期的持续时间在不同地区有所不同。

definition_en: characterized by constant change or activity

example_sentences.en: Language is a dynamic system that evolves over time.
example_sentences.cn: 语言是一个随时间演变的动态系统。

example_sentences.en: The dynamic nature of ecosystems makes prediction difficult.
example_sentences.cn: 生态系统的动态性质使预测变得困难。

definition_en: a component; a substance that cannot be broken down

example_sentences.en: Carbon is a fundamental element in organic chemistry.
example_sentences.cn: 碳是有机化学中的基本元素。

example_sentences.en: Trust is an essential element of effective leadership.
example_sentences.cn: 信任是有效领导力的基本要素。

definition_en: completely remove or get rid of

example_sentences.en: The goal is to eliminate poverty through sustainable development.
example_sentences.cn: 目标是通过可持续发展消除贫困。

example_sentences.en: Researchers eliminated confounding variables from the experiment.
example_sentences.cn: 研究人员从实验中排除了混杂变量。

definition_en: come into view; become apparent

example_sentences.en: New technologies emerge rapidly in the digital age.
example_sentences.cn: 新技术在数字时代迅速涌现。

example_sentences.en: Several themes emerged from the analysis of interview data.
example_sentences.cn: 从访谈数据的分析中浮现了几个主题。

definition_en: based on observation or experience rather than theory

example_sentences.en: The hypothesis must be supported by empirical evidence.
example_sentences.cn: 假设必须有实证证据支持。

example_sentences.en: Empirical research forms the foundation of modern science.
example_sentences.cn: 实证研究构成了现代科学的基础。

definition_en: give the means or ability to do something

example_sentences.en: Technology enables students to access educational resources remotely.
example_sentences.cn: 技术使学生能够远程获取教育资源。

example_sentences.en: The grant enabled the team to purchase new laboratory equipment.
example_sentences.cn: 拨款使团队能够购买新的实验室设备。

definition_en: unexpectedly meet or experience

example_sentences.en: Students may encounter unfamiliar vocabulary in academic texts.
example_sentences.cn: 学生在学术文本中可能会遇到不熟悉的词汇。

example_sentences.en: The expedition encountered severe weather conditions.
example_sentences.cn: 探险队遇到了恶劣的天气条件。

definition_en: intensify, increase, or improve quality

example_sentences.en: Technology can enhance the learning experience in the classroom.
example_sentences.cn: 技术可以增强课堂上的学习体验。

example_sentences.en: Adding fertilizer enhances soil fertility and crop yield.
example_sentences.cn: 施肥可以增强土壤肥力和作物产量。

definition_en: very large in size, quantity, or extent

example_sentences.en: The project required an enormous amount of computational power.
example_sentences.cn: 该项目需要大量的计算能力。

example_sentences.en: Deforestation has caused enormous damage to tropical ecosystems.
example_sentences.cn: 森林砍伐对热带生态系统造成了巨大的破坏。

definition_en: equal in value or function

example_sentences.en: One mile is roughly equivalent to 1.6 kilometers.
example_sentences.cn: 一英里大约等于1.6公里。

example_sentences.en: The Chinese system has no exact equivalent in Western philosophy.
example_sentences.cn: 中国的体系在西方哲学中没有确切的对应物。

definition_en: gradually wear away; diminish over time

example_sentences.en: Wind and water erode rock formations over millions of years.
example_sentences.cn: 风和水在数百万年间侵蚀岩层。

example_sentences.en: Public trust in institutions has been eroded by repeated scandals.
example_sentences.cn: 公众对机构的信任因反复的丑闻而受到侵蚀。

definition_en: relating to a group sharing cultural traditions

example_sentences.en: Ethnic diversity enriches the cultural fabric of a society.
example_sentences.cn: 民族多样性丰富了社会的文化结构。

example_sentences.en: The study examined health disparities among different ethnic groups.
example_sentences.cn: 该研究考察了不同民族群体之间的健康差异。

definition_en: develop gradually over time

example_sentences.en: Species evolve through natural selection over generations.
example_sentences.cn: 物种通过自然选择在代际间进化。

example_sentences.en: The city's transportation system has evolved significantly.
example_sentences.cn: 该城市的交通系统已经发生了重大演变。

definition_en: be greater than; go beyond a limit

example_sentences.en: Global carbon emissions now exceed safe levels defined by scientists.
example_sentences.cn: 全球碳排放现在超过了科学家界定的安全水平。

example_sentences.en: The cost of the project exceeded the original budget by 30 percent.
example_sentences.cn: 该项目的成本超出原始预算30%。

definition_en: deny access to; leave out

example_sentences.en: The study excluded participants with pre-existing health conditions.
example_sentences.cn: 该研究排除了有既往健康状况的参与者。

example_sentences.en: Certain groups have historically been excluded from education.
example_sentences.cn: 某些群体在历史上一直被排斥在教育之外。

definition_en: show or display; a public display

example_sentences.en: The patient exhibited symptoms of a rare neurological disorder.
example_sentences.cn: 患者表现出罕见神经系统疾病的症状。

example_sentences.en: The museum's new exhibit features artifacts from ancient Egypt.
example_sentences.cn: 博物馆的新展览展出了来自古埃及的文物。

definition_en: become or make larger; develop in detail

example_sentences.en: The universe continues to expand at an accelerating rate.
example_sentences.cn: 宇宙继续以加速的速度膨胀。

example_sentences.en: The company plans to expand its operations into new markets.
example_sentences.cn: 公司计划将业务扩展到新市场。

definition_en: stated clearly and in detail

example_sentences.en: The contract contains explicit terms regarding payment deadlines.
example_sentences.cn: 合同包含关于付款截止日期的明确条款。

example_sentences.en: The professor gave explicit instructions for the assignment.
example_sentences.cn: 教授对作业给出了明确的指导。

definition_en: make full use of; use unfairly for profit

example_sentences.en: Companies must not exploit workers in developing countries.
example_sentences.cn: 公司不得剥削发展中国家的工人。

example_sentences.en: Scientists exploit new technologies to advance medical research.
example_sentences.cn: 科学家利用新技术推进医学研究。

definition_en: concerned with beauty or artistic taste

example_sentences.en: The aesthetic qualities of the building earned it architectural awards.
example_sentences.cn: 这座建筑的美学品质使其获得了建筑奖项。

example_sentences.en: Japanese garden design reflects a unique aesthetic philosophy.
example_sentences.cn: 日本园林设计反映了独特的美学哲学。

definition_en: make pain or a problem less severe

example_sentences.en: New medications can alleviate the symptoms of chronic pain.
example_sentences.cn: 新药物可以减轻慢性疼痛的症状。

example_sentences.en: International aid aims to alleviate poverty in developing nations.
example_sentences.cn: 国际援助旨在减轻发展中国家的贫困。

definition_en: combine or unite to form one structure

example_sentences.en: The two departments were amalgamated to improve efficiency.
example_sentences.cn: 两个部门合并以提高效率。

example_sentences.en: The theory amalgamates ideas from biology and psychology.
example_sentences.cn: 该理论融合了生物学和心理学的理念。

definition_en: make something bad better or more tolerable

example_sentences.en: Urban green spaces can ameliorate the effects of air pollution.
example_sentences.cn: 城市绿地可以改善空气污染的影响。

example_sentences.en: The new policy aims to ameliorate living conditions for refugees.
example_sentences.cn: 新政策旨在改善难民的生活条件。

definition_en: something that deviates from what is expected

example_sentences.en: The temperature anomaly puzzled climate scientists for years.
example_sentences.cn: 温度异常使气候科学家困惑了多年。

example_sentences.en: Statistical anomalies in the data suggested possible errors.
example_sentences.cn: 数据中的统计异常暗示可能存在错误。

definition_en: cause someone to become hostile; act in opposition

example_sentences.en: Certain chemicals antagonize the effect of neurotransmitters.
example_sentences.cn: 某些化学物质拮抗神经递质的作用。

example_sentences.en: The new regulations antagonized the farming community.
example_sentences.cn: 新法规激怒了农业社区。

definition_en: a very typical example; an original model

example_sentences.en: The hero's journey is a narrative archetype found across cultures.
example_sentences.cn: 英雄之旅是一种跨文化的叙事原型。

example_sentences.en: The Victorian novel serves as an archetype for literary realism.
example_sentences.cn: 维多利亚时代的小说是文学现实主义的原型。

definition_en: express clearly; fluent and coherent
definition_cn: 清晰表达；表达能力强的

example_sentences.en: The speaker articulated the challenges facing modern education.
example_sentences.cn: 演讲者清晰地阐述了现代教育面临的挑战。

example_sentences.en: An articulate essay requires careful planning and revision.
example_sentences.cn: 一篇表达清晰的文章需要仔细规划和修改。

definition_en: find out for certain; determine

example_sentences.en: Investigators are trying to ascertain the cause of the accident.
example_sentences.cn: 调查人员正在试图查明事故原因。

example_sentences.en: It is difficult to ascertain the long-term effects of the policy.
example_sentences.cn: 很难确定该政策的长期影响。

definition_en: absorb and integrate; take in information

example_sentences.en: Immigrants gradually assimilate into the culture of their new country.
example_sentences.cn: 移民逐渐融入新国家的文化。

example_sentences.en: Students need time to assimilate complex scientific concepts.
example_sentences.cn: 学生需要时间消化吸收复杂的科学概念。

definition_en: reduce the force, effect, or value of

example_sentences.en: The signal attenuates as it passes through dense material.
example_sentences.cn: 信号在穿过致密材料时会衰减。

example_sentences.en: Vaccination uses an attenuated form of the virus to build immunity.
example_sentences.cn: 疫苗接种使用减毒形式的病毒来建立免疫力。

definition_en: make greater by adding to it; increase

example_sentences.en: Technology can augment human capabilities in many fields.
example_sentences.cn: 技术可以在许多领域增强人类的能力。

example_sentences.en: The team augmented the dataset with additional observations.
example_sentences.cn: 团队通过额外的观察数据增强了数据集。

definition_en: having self-government; independent

example_sentences.en: Autonomous vehicles use AI to navigate without human intervention.
example_sentences.cn: 自动驾驶汽车使用AI在没有人工干预的情况下导航。

example_sentences.en: The region gained autonomous status after years of negotiation.
example_sentences.cn: 该地区经过多年谈判获得了自治地位。

definition_en: a strong feeling of dislike or reluctance

example_sentences.en: Many investors have a natural aversion to risk.
example_sentences.cn: 许多投资者对风险有天生的厌恶。

example_sentences.en: Taste aversion is a psychological response to potentially harmful food.
example_sentences.cn: 味觉厌恶是对潜在有害食物的心理反应。

definition_en: well-meaning and kindly; charitable

example_sentences.en: The benevolent foundation provided scholarships to disadvantaged students.
example_sentences.cn: 这个慈善基金会为弱势学生提供奖学金。

example_sentences.en: A benevolent leader prioritizes the welfare of citizens.
example_sentences.cn: 一位仁慈的领导者优先考虑公民的福利。

definition_en: support or strengthen

example_sentences.en: The new evidence bolsters the case for climate action.
example_sentences.cn: 新证据加强了采取气候行动的理由。

example_sentences.en: Government spending helped bolster the economy during the recession.
example_sentences.cn: 政府支出在经济衰退期间帮助支撑了经济。

definition_en: begin to grow or increase rapidly

example_sentences.en: The tech industry has burgeoned over the past two decades.
example_sentences.cn: 科技行业在过去二十年中蓬勃发展。

example_sentences.en: Interest in sustainable agriculture is burgeoning worldwide.
example_sentences.cn: 全球对可持续农业的兴趣正在迅速增长。

definition_en: a substance that speeds up a reaction; something that causes change

example_sentences.en: The invention of the printing press was a catalyst for the spread of knowledge.
example_sentences.cn: 印刷术的发明是知识传播的催化剂。

example_sentences.en: Enzymes act as biological catalysts in metabolic reactions.
example_sentences.cn: 酶在代谢反应中充当生物催化剂。

definition_en: restrict within limits; define boundaries

example_sentences.en: The law circumscribes the powers of the executive branch.
example_sentences.cn: 法律限制了行政部门的权力。

example_sentences.en: Traditional gender roles circumscribed women's opportunities.
example_sentences.cn: 传统的性别角色限制了女性的机会。

definition_en: come together to form one mass or whole

example_sentences.en: Several small groups coalesced into a single political movement.
example_sentences.cn: 几个小团体合并成一个政治运动。

example_sentences.en: Dust particles coalesce to form larger bodies in space.
example_sentences.cn: 尘埃颗粒在太空中聚合形成更大的天体。

definition_en: having knowledge or awareness

example_sentences.en: Researchers must be cognizant of potential biases in their studies.
example_sentences.cn: 研究人员必须意识到研究中潜在的偏差。

example_sentences.en: Citizens are becoming more cognizant of environmental issues.
example_sentences.cn: 公民越来越意识到环境问题。

definition_en: corresponding in size or degree; proportionate

example_sentences.en: Salaries should be commensurate with experience and qualifications.
example_sentences.cn: 薪资应与经验和资质相称。

example_sentences.en: The punishment was not commensurate with the severity of the crime.
example_sentences.cn: 惩罚与犯罪的严重性不相称。

definition_en: evoking interest in a powerfully irresistible way
definition_cn: 令人信服的，引人注目的

example_sentences.en: The documentary presents a compelling case for ocean conservation.
example_sentences.cn: 这部纪录片提出了令人信服的海洋保护论据。

example_sentences.en: Compelling evidence supports the link between diet and health.
example_sentences.cn: 令人信服的证据支持饮食与健康之间的联系。

definition_en: admit that something is true; yield

example_sentences.en: Critics concede that the policy has had some positive effects.
example_sentences.cn: 批评者承认该政策产生了一些积极效果。

example_sentences.en: The researcher conceded that the sample size was too small.
example_sentences.cn: 研究人员承认样本量太小。

definition_en: accept or allow behavior considered wrong

example_sentences.en: The university does not condone academic dishonesty.
example_sentences.cn: 大学不容忍学术不诚实行为。

example_sentences.en: Silence should not be interpreted as condoning the behavior.
example_sentences.cn: 沉默不应被解释为纵容这种行为。

definition_en: the junction of two rivers; a coming together

example_sentences.en: The city developed at the confluence of two major rivers.
example_sentences.cn: 这座城市在两条主要河流的汇合处发展起来。

example_sentences.en: A confluence of economic and social factors led to the revolution.
example_sentences.cn: 经济和社会因素的汇聚导致了这场革命。

definition_en: an opinion formed without sufficient evidence; to guess

example_sentences.en: Without more data, any explanation remains mere conjecture.
example_sentences.cn: 没有更多数据，任何解释都只是推测。

example_sentences.en: Mathematicians have been unable to prove the famous conjecture.
example_sentences.cn: 数学家们一直无法证明这个著名的猜想。

definition_en: an idea suggested by a word in addition to its literal meaning

example_sentences.en: The word 'home' carries connotations of warmth and security.
example_sentences.cn: '家'这个词带有温暖和安全的含义。

example_sentences.en: Political language is often chosen for its emotional connotations.
example_sentences.cn: 政治语言通常因其情感含义而被选用。

definition_en: wishing to do what is right; thorough and careful

example_sentences.en: Conscientious students tend to perform better academically.
example_sentences.cn: 认真的学生往往在学业上表现更好。

example_sentences.en: A conscientious approach to research ensures reliable results.
example_sentences.cn: 认真的研究方法确保可靠的结果。

definition_en: general agreement among a group

example_sentences.en: There is scientific consensus that human activity drives climate change.
example_sentences.cn: 科学界有共识认为人类活动驱动气候变化。

example_sentences.en: The committee reached a consensus after extensive deliberation.
example_sentences.cn: 委员会在广泛讨论后达成了共识。

definition_en: dependent on certain conditions

example_sentences.en: Funding is contingent upon the successful completion of Phase 1.
example_sentences.cn: 资金取决于第一阶段的成功完成。

example_sentences.en: The outcome is contingent on several unpredictable factors.
example_sentences.cn: 结果取决于几个不可预测的因素。

definition_en: come together from different directions

example_sentences.en: Multiple lines of evidence converge to support the theory.
example_sentences.cn: 多条证据线索汇聚起来支持该理论。

example_sentences.en: The two rivers converge at the edge of the valley.
example_sentences.cn: 两条河流在山谷边缘汇合。

definition_en: confirm or give support to a statement

example_sentences.en: Subsequent experiments corroborated the initial findings.
example_sentences.cn: 后续实验证实了初步发现。

example_sentences.en: Archaeological evidence corroborates the historical accounts.
example_sentences.cn: 考古证据佐证了历史记载。

definition_en: reach a climax or point of highest development

example_sentences.en: Years of research culminated in a groundbreaking discovery.
example_sentences.cn: 多年的研究最终带来了一项开创性发现。

example_sentences.en: The movement culminated in the passage of civil rights legislation.
example_sentences.cn: 这场运动以民权立法的通过而告终。

definition_en: reduce in extent or quantity; impose a restriction

example_sentences.en: Budget cuts forced the university to curtail several programs.
example_sentences.cn: 预算削减迫使大学缩减了几个项目。

example_sentences.en: Regulations were introduced to curtail pollution from factories.
example_sentences.cn: 出台了法规以限制工厂的污染。

definition_en: make someone very weak

example_sentences.en: Chronic illness can debilitate patients physically and mentally.
example_sentences.cn: 慢性疾病可以在身体和精神上使患者衰弱。

example_sentences.en: Prolonged drought debilitated the agricultural sector.
example_sentences.cn: 长期干旱使农业部门衰弱。

definition_en: describe or portray precisely

example_sentences.en: The study delineates the boundaries between the two species.
example_sentences.cn: 该研究划定了两个物种之间的界限。

example_sentences.en: The contract delineates the responsibilities of each party.
example_sentences.cn: 合同明确了各方的责任。

definition_en: feel or express strong disapproval of

example_sentences.en: Environmental groups deplore the destruction of natural habitats.
example_sentences.cn: 环保组织谴责对自然栖息地的破坏。

example_sentences.en: Many scholars deplore the decline in reading among young people.
example_sentences.cn: 许多学者对年轻人阅读量下降表示痛惜。

definition_en: represent by a drawing or painting; describe

example_sentences.en: The mural depicts scenes from the country's revolutionary history.
example_sentences.cn: 壁画描绘了该国革命历史的场景。

example_sentences.en: The novel depicts the struggles of immigrant families in the early 1900s.
example_sentences.cn: 这部小说描绘了20世纪初移民家庭的艰难。

definition_en: become progressively worse

example_sentences.en: Air quality continues to deteriorate in major urban centers.
example_sentences.cn: 主要城市中心的空气质量继续恶化。

example_sentences.en: Without proper maintenance, the historic building will deteriorate.
example_sentences.cn: 如果没有适当的维护，这座历史建筑将会恶化。

definition_en: a division into two mutually exclusive groups

example_sentences.en: The dichotomy between nature and nurture is a central debate in psychology.
example_sentences.cn: 先天与后天的二分法是心理学中的核心辩论。

example_sentences.en: The false dichotomy between economic growth and environmental protection must be challenged.
example_sentences.cn: 经济增长与环境保护之间的虚假对立必须受到质疑。

definition_en: spread over a wide area; not concentrated

example_sentences.en: Innovation tends to diffuse from urban centers to rural areas.
example_sentences.cn: 创新往往从城市中心扩散到农村地区。

example_sentences.en: The diffuse light created a soft, even illumination in the gallery.
example_sentences.cn: 漫射光在画廊中创造了柔和均匀的照明。

definition_en: leave the main subject temporarily

example_sentences.en: The lecturer occasionally digressed to share relevant anecdotes.
example_sentences.cn: 讲师偶尔离题分享相关的轶事。

example_sentences.en: It is important not to digress too far from the thesis statement.
example_sentences.cn: 重要的是不要偏离论文主旨太远。

definition_en: a situation requiring a difficult choice

example_sentences.en: Doctors face an ethical dilemma when treating terminally ill patients.
example_sentences.cn: 医生在治疗绝症患者时面临伦理困境。

example_sentences.en: The energy dilemma involves balancing growth with sustainability.
example_sentences.cn: 能源困境涉及平衡增长与可持续性。

definition_en: perceive or recognize something

example_sentences.en: It is difficult to discern the true impact of the policy at this stage.
example_sentences.cn: 在现阶段很难辨别该政策的真正影响。

example_sentences.en: Trained observers can discern subtle differences in species behavior.
example_sentences.cn: 训练有素的观察者可以辨别物种行为中的细微差异。

definition_en: essentially different in kind; not comparable

example_sentences.en: The study integrated data from disparate sources.
example_sentences.cn: 该研究整合了来自不同来源的数据。

example_sentences.en: Disparate communities were united by a common goal.
example_sentences.cn: 迥异的社区因共同的目标而团结在一起。

definition_en: spread information widely

example_sentences.en: The internet has revolutionized how information is disseminated.
example_sentences.cn: 互联网彻底改变了信息传播的方式。

example_sentences.en: Researchers disseminate their findings through academic journals.
example_sentences.cn: 研究人员通过学术期刊传播他们的发现。

definition_en: a belief or set of beliefs held by a group

example_sentences.en: The doctrine of separation of powers is fundamental to democracy.
example_sentences.cn: 权力分立学说是民主的基础。

example_sentences.en: Scientific doctrines are subject to revision as new evidence emerges.
example_sentences.cn: 科学学说随着新证据的出现而修正。

definition_en: the ability to produce a desired result

example_sentences.en: Clinical trials are conducted to determine the efficacy of new drugs.
example_sentences.cn: 进行临床试验以确定新药的疗效。

example_sentences.en: The efficacy of the educational program was evaluated through testing.
example_sentences.cn: 通过测试评估了该教育项目的效力。

definition_en: draw out a response or reaction

example_sentences.en: The survey was designed to elicit honest responses from participants.
example_sentences.cn: 该调查旨在引出参与者的诚实回答。

example_sentences.en: The discovery elicited excitement in the scientific community.
example_sentences.cn: 这一发现在科学界引起了兴奋。

definition_en: fluent or persuasive in speaking or writing

example_sentences.en: The professor delivered an eloquent defense of liberal arts education.
example_sentences.cn: 教授对文科教育做了雄辩的辩护。

example_sentences.en: The data speaks more eloquently than any verbal argument.
example_sentences.cn: 数据比任何口头论证都更有说服力。

definition_en: give a body to; be an expression of

example_sentences.en: The constitution embodies the fundamental values of the nation.
example_sentences.cn: 宪法体现了国家的基本价值观。

example_sentences.en: The new design embodies principles of sustainability.
example_sentences.cn: 新设计体现了可持续性原则。

definition_en: surround or cover; include comprehensively

example_sentences.en: The study encompasses a wide range of socioeconomic factors.
example_sentences.cn: 这项研究涵盖了广泛的社会经济因素。

example_sentences.en: The park encompasses over 1,000 square kilometers of wilderness.
example_sentences.cn: 该公园涵盖了超过1,000平方公里的荒野。

definition_en: an attempt to achieve a goal; to try hard

example_sentences.en: Space exploration is humanity's most ambitious scientific endeavor.
example_sentences.cn: 太空探索是人类最雄心勃勃的科学事业。

example_sentences.en: The team endeavored to complete the project before the deadline.
example_sentences.cn: 团队努力在截止日期前完成项目。

definition_en: something mysterious or difficult to understand

example_sentences.en: Dark matter remains one of the great enigmas of modern physics.
example_sentences.cn: 暗物质仍然是现代物理学的重大谜团之一。

example_sentences.en: The purpose of the ancient stone structures remains an enigma.
example_sentences.cn: 这些古代石头结构的目的仍然是个谜。

definition_en: be a perfect example of

example_sentences.en: The Parthenon epitomizes the architectural achievements of ancient Greece.
example_sentences.cn: 帕特农神庙是古希腊建筑成就的典范。

example_sentences.en: Her research epitomizes the interdisciplinary approach to science.
example_sentences.cn: 她的研究是跨学科科学方法的典范。

definition_en: open to more than one interpretation; ambiguous

example_sentences.en: The test results were equivocal and did not confirm the diagnosis.
example_sentences.cn: 测试结果模棱两可，未能确认诊断。

example_sentences.en: His equivocal response left the committee uncertain about his position.
example_sentences.cn: 他模棱两可的回答使委员会对他的立场感到不确定。

definition_en: destroy completely; put an end to

example_sentences.en: Global efforts have nearly eradicated polio through vaccination.
example_sentences.cn: 全球努力通过疫苗接种几乎根除了脊髓灰质炎。

example_sentences.en: The campaign aims to eradicate illiteracy in rural communities.
example_sentences.cn: 该运动旨在消除农村社区的文盲。

definition_en: make a problem or situation worse

example_sentences.en: Climate change is expected to exacerbate water scarcity in arid regions.
example_sentences.cn: 气候变化预计将加剧干旱地区的水资源短缺。

example_sentences.en: Social inequality can exacerbate tensions between communities.
example_sentences.cn: 社会不平等可能加剧社区之间的紧张关系。

definition_en: be a typical example of; illustrate

example_sentences.en: This case study exemplifies the challenges of urban development.
example_sentences.cn: 这个案例研究例证了城市发展的挑战。

example_sentences.en: The architect's work exemplifies the principles of modernist design.
